summary: Ultra-premium luxury salon website for Imagine Unisex Salon (Rudrapur, Uttarakhand). Features cinematic loading screen, full-screen hero slideshow, services section (Haircut, Beard Styling, Hair Styling, Facial, Hair Coloring, Keratin Treatment, Makeup), premium portfolio gallery with lightbox, Instagram-style gallery grid, testimonials carousel, booking form with backend storage, admin dashboard for booking management, Google Maps embed, dark/light mode toggle, scroll animations, floating contact buttons (WhatsApp/Call/Instagram), and responsive design. Pricing section shows service names only — no prices displayed (salon provides pricing in person). Contact: +91 9917417861, Instagram: instagram.com/imagine_unisexsalon.
architectural_notes: Styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean, modern look
Google Maps embedded via iframe (no API key); links open exact salon location in Google Maps
No before/after slider section per user request
No online payment features; Pricing section (service price list) is retained but all payment/checkout flows are removed
Pricing section shows service names only — all price amounts removed; salon provides pricing in person
Phone/WhatsApp updated to +91 9917417861 (wa.me/919917417861) — old number +91 96904 17361 fully removed

existing_features.title: Create a visually striking hero section with the salon name, a tagline, and a prominent call-to-action button (e.g., 'Book an Appointment'). Apply a warm, elegant visual theme using rich neutrals (cream, warm whites, deep charcoal, and gold accents) with sophisticated typography (serif headings, clean sans-serif body text) that feels luxurious and modern throughout the entire site.

Build a Services section that showcases the salon's main service categories (e.g., Haircuts, Coloring, Styling, Treatments, Nails, Spa). Display each service as a card with an icon, service name, and short description. Layout should be a responsive grid.

Build a Pricing section listing service prices organized by category. Each category should have a clearly labeled header and a list of services with their corresponding prices. The layout should be clean and easy to scan.
Build a Gallery section displaying a grid layout of salon work photos using the generated static assets. Images should be displayed with a subtle hover effect (slight zoom or overlay).

Build a Booking/Contact section with a form that collects the client's name, email, phone number, preferred service, and preferred date/time. Include the salon's address, phone number, and business hours. The form should have basic client-side validation and submit data to the backend.

Add a sticky navigation bar at the top with the salon logo/name and smooth-scroll anchor links to all sections (Services, Pricing, Gallery, Contact). Include a mobile hamburger menu for small screens.
Add a footer with the salon name, a short tagline, social media icon links (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter), and copyright text.
Render the generated static images (hero background, gallery photos, section background) from frontend/public/assets/generated throughout the site.

Implement a cinematic animated loading screen that displays the salon name 'Imagine Unisex Salon' with a luxury animation (e.g., gold shimmer, elegant fade-in text) and then smoothly fades out before revealing the main site. It should appear only on initial page load.

Replace the current static hero section with a full-screen automatic image slideshow cycling through 7 ultra-HD luxury salon images with smooth slide and fade transitions. Overlay the text 'Imagine Unisex Salon' and 'Luxury Beauty & Grooming Experience' and include four CTA buttons: Book Appointment (scrolls to booking form), Call Now (tel:+919030504422), WhatsApp Chat (https://wa.me/919030504422), and Instagram (https://instagram.com/imagineunisexsalon).

Add advanced scroll-triggered animations site-wide: sections entering from left/right alternate, with fade-in and subtle zoom-in effects. Apply a parallax scrolling depth effect to the hero and at least one section background image.

Upgrade the Services section to include 7 services — Haircut & Styling, Hair Coloring, Facial & Skin Care, Beard Grooming, Bridal Makeup, Hair Treatment, Nail Services — each displayed as a premium card with a high-quality service image, icon, name, short description, and a smooth hover animation (lift + gold glow border effect).

Build a premium portfolio gallery section displaying 36+ high-quality salon images in a masonry or multi-column grid layout. Clicking any image opens a full-screen lightbox slideshow with navigation arrows, close button, and smooth open/close animation.

Add an Instagram-style gallery section with a 3-column grid of 9–12 premium salon images. Each image should have a hover overlay with a heart/like icon and the Instagram logo. Include a prominent 'Follow on Instagram' button that links to https://instagram.com/imagineunisexsalon.

Build a testimonials section with an auto-playing sliding carousel displaying at least 6 client reviews. Each testimonial card should show a star rating (5 stars), client name, short review text, and optionally an avatar/initials. Include prev/next controls and dot indicators.

Add a Google Maps section that embeds the salon location at 'Radhe Complex, Kashipur Bypass Rd, Adarsh Colony, Rudrapur, Uttarakhand' using a Google Maps iframe embed (no API key). Display a direction button that opens the location in Google Maps. Include the salon address and a 'Get Directions' CTA alongside the map.

Implement a Light/Dark mode toggle button that persists the user's preference (localStorage). In dark mode, the entire site switches to a deep charcoal/black luxury dark palette with gold accents. In light mode, the site uses cream/warm white with charcoal and gold accents.

Add three persistent floating action buttons anchored to the bottom-right corner of the screen (always visible on scroll): a green WhatsApp button (https://wa.me/919030504422), a blue/charcoal Call button (tel:+919030504422), and an Instagram gradient button (https://instagram.com/imagineunisexsalon). Buttons should have tooltip labels and a subtle pulse animation.

Update the navigation bar and footer to include direct links/icons for Instagram (https://instagram.com/imagineunisexsalon), WhatsApp (https://wa.me/919030504422), and Call Now (tel:+919030504422) as prominent, styled buttons or icon links. The nav bar should also show the dark mode toggle.

Ensure the entire website is fully responsive and optimized for mobile (320px+), tablet (768px+), and desktop (1280px+). Touch interactions (swipe carousels, tap lightbox) must work correctly. Typography, spacing, and layout must adapt gracefully at all breakpoints. The overall visual feel must match an ultra-premium international luxury salon brand — gold accents, refined typography, generous whitespace, and cinematic imagery.

Update all phone number references throughout the entire site to +91 96904 17361. This includes: the Call Now button (tel:+919690417361), all WhatsApp links (https://wa.me/919690417361), the booking form's pre-filled or displayed phone info, the header contact display, the footer contact display, the MapSection contact info, and the floating Call and WhatsApp action buttons in FloatingActionButtons.tsx.

Update all Instagram links throughout the site to https://www.instagram.com/imagine_unisexsalon. This includes: the Navigation bar's Instagram icon link, the Footer's Instagram social link, the BookingContact / contact section Instagram link, the floating Instagram action button in FloatingActionButtons.tsx, and the InstagramGallery 'Follow on Instagram' button.

Update the Services section (frontend/src/components/Services.tsx) to display exactly these 7 services in this order: Haircut, Beard Styling, Hair Styling, Facial, Hair Coloring, Keratin Treatment, Makeup. Remove any services not in this list (e.g., Nail Services, Bridal Makeup as a separate card). Each card must retain the premium card layout with an image, icon, name, short description, and gold glow hover animation.

Build an Admin Dashboard page/view (frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.tsx or a dedicated route/modal) that fetches and displays all submitted bookings from the backend using the getAllBookings query. The dashboard should show each booking's client name, email, phone, preferred service, preferred date/time, and submission timestamp in a clean, scannable table or card list. Access should be gated — show the dashboard only when a valid admin PIN or after clicking a hidden admin link (e.g., appending ?admin=true to the URL or navigating to /admin). Style it to match the ultra-premium dark/gold theme.

Add WhatsApp booking integration to the BookingContact form. After a successful form submission (stored in backend), present the user with a WhatsApp CTA button that pre-fills a booking message using the submitted details and opens https://wa.me/919690417361 with a URL-encoded message such as 'Hi, I'd like to book: [Service] on [Date/Time]. Name: [Name], Phone: [Phone]'. The button should be visually prominent in the post-submission confirmation state.

In frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx, remove all price values from every service item — this includes all currency symbols (e.g. '$', '₹'), numeric amounts (e.g. $85, $110, $145), and any 'From $...' or 'Starting at $...' text. Keep only service category headers and service names. The section layout and styling must remain fully intact.

Update all phone number references across the entire frontend to +91 9917417861. Replace every occurrence of the old number (+91 96904 17361 / +919690417361) with the new number. Specifically update: (1) Navigation.tsx — phone display and any tel: link; (2) Hero.tsx — Call Now CTA button to tel:+919917417861 and WhatsApp CTA button to https://wa.me/919917417861; (3) FloatingActionButtons.tsx — Call button href to tel:+919917417861 and WhatsApp button href to https://wa.me/919917417861; (4) BookingContact.tsx — displayed phone info and the post-submission WhatsApp CTA link to https://wa.me/919917417861; (5) Footer.tsx — phone number display and any tel:/WhatsApp links; (6) MapSection.tsx — contact phone display. Ensure no trace of the old number remains anywhere in the codebase.

new_feature_requests.summary: Store booking form submissions in the backend. Each submission should record: client name, email, phone, preferred service, preferred date/time, and a submission timestamp. Expose an update function to submit bookings and a query function to retrieve all bookings.
Cinematic animated loading screen with smooth luxury fade-out
Full-screen automatic hero image slideshow with salon name, tagline, and CTA buttons (Book, Call, WhatsApp, Instagram)
Advanced scroll animations: sections slide from left/right, fade/zoom, parallax scrolling
Premium portfolio gallery with 40+ HD images and lightbox slideshow on click
Instagram-style gallery grid (6–12 images) with hover animations and Follow button linking to instagram.com/imagineunisexsalon
Sliding testimonials carousel with client reviews
Google Maps embed (no API key) showing Radhe Complex, Kashipur Bypass Rd, Rudrapur location
Light/Dark mode toggle throughout the site
Floating WhatsApp, Call, and Instagram buttons always visible on screen
Instagram, WhatsApp, and Call Now buttons in header and footer
Update phone number to +91 96904 17361 everywhere: Call button, WhatsApp links (wa.me/919690417361), booking form, header, footer, and floating buttons
Update Instagram link to https://www.instagram.com/imagine_unisexsalon in header, footer, contact section, and floating Instagram button
Update services section to exactly: Haircut, Beard Styling, Hair Styling, Facial, Hair Coloring, Keratin Treatment, Makeup
Admin dashboard to securely view all submitted booking appointments

Update the backend (backend/main.mo) to store booking submissions with all required fields: client name, email, phone, preferred service, preferred date/time, and submission timestamp. Expose a submitBooking update function and a getAllBookings query function that returns all stored bookings. Ensure the data is stored in stable memory so it persists across upgrades.
Remove all online payment features completely (payment buttons, payment forms, checkout flows, payment-related backend logic). Keep the Pricing section intact.

Remove all online payment features from the frontend completely. This includes: any payment buttons (e.g., 'Pay Now', 'Checkout', 'Pay Online'), payment forms or checkout flows, payment method selectors (credit card, UPI, etc.), and any payment-related UI elements or modals. The Pricing section (frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx) must remain fully intact — do not remove or alter it. All other sections (booking form, gallery, testimonials, admin dashboard, etc.) must remain untouched.

Remove all payment-related backend logic from backend/main.mo. This includes any payment processing functions, payment record storage, payment status queries, or payment-related data types. The booking submission and retrieval functions (submitBooking, getAllBookings) and all other existing backend logic must remain fully intact.
Remove all price amounts (dollar signs, numbers like $85/$110/$145, 'From $...' text) from the entire website. Keep only service names in the Pricing section — no monetary values displayed anywhere.

Audit all other frontend components (Services.tsx, BookingContact.tsx, Hero.tsx, Footer.tsx, Navigation.tsx, MapSection.tsx, FloatingActionButtons.tsx, and any other component) for any remaining price amounts, dollar signs, or 'From $...' text and remove them. Only service names and descriptions should remain.

Update phone number to +91 9917417861 (wa.me/919917417861) everywhere: Header, Hero CTA Call/WhatsApp buttons, floating Call/WhatsApp buttons, Booking/Contact section, Footer, and Map/Contact section. Remove old number +91 96904 17361 completely.
